function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I found the day-job exception project (`40_projects/2026_03_25_dockflow_exception_radar/README.MD`), but I could not find a canonical `40_projects` project for “the attic rainwater rig,” so I can’t reliably compare start dates or choose which project to delete without guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow and canonical-evidence rules: inbox requests are not canonical truth; project canon is README.MD inside 40_projects folders; when canonical support is missing, stop without mutating files.
function.outcome_justification: `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requests deleting one of two projects, but only one can be canonically identified in `40_projects` (`dockflow_exception_radar`, start date from folder prefix `2026_03_25`). Searches in `/40_projects` for attic/rainwater/rig/water found no canonical match, and `40_projects/2026_04_06_window_farm_notes/README.MD` is a different project. Per `process-next-inbox-item.md` and `00_inbox/AGENTS.MD`, missing canonical support requires stopping without mutation.
